title: Add The Mork Stack to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [The Mork Stack](https://github.com/Mork-Zuckerbarge/mork-stack) to business
- Manage social media with agentic workflows and run autonomous trading on Solana in The Mork Stack.

Fixes #10896

gist.headline: The Mork Stack joins the garden
gist.blurb: The Mork Stack just sprouted in the Greenhouse. It uses agentic workflows to manage social media and run autonomous trading on Solana, because why do things manually when the bots can do it?
gist.summary: Added 'The Mork Stack' to the community showcase, an app that uses agentic workflows for social media management and autonomous Solana trading.
gist.impact: Developers can now explore how to build autonomous social and trading agents using Pollinations infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: The Mork Stack involves social media management, agentic workflows, and Solana (crypto) trading. Visuals: A cozy pixel art scene with Polly the bee and a robot managing multiple screens (social media) and maybe some shiny pixel coins (Solana/crypto).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny business tie, working alongside a chunky monitor-head robot at a retro trading desk. The screens glow with lime green (#ecf874) charts and social media feeds, while small pixelated gold coins sit on the desk. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
